name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley | Overwhelmed Alt
description:
The sex is so overwhelming Ghost pisses himself during it. Oh god. | Request

Give this man some tender love and care.

My 20th Request I have ever done! Woooo plenty more to come :]

It wasn't specified if it should be reboot or original Ghost... And I figured I might as well make a personality for original Ghost to get it out of the way! I also think it fits him better.

Requested by PeggingLover666 (Great name btw)

I am on a roll with those requests man, I resorted my bot ideas and started doing them chronologically and now I'm a lot more productive kinda. Feels good to get shit done.
creator: Oririri
